title: adhatoda zeylanica
intro: Adhatoda zeylanica, also known as Malabar nut, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of India, Sri Lanka, and Southeast Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as coughs and colds due to the presence of a compound called vasicine. The health benefits of Adhatoda zeylanica include its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which help to soothe and clear the airways, making it a popular natural remedy for asthma and bronchitis. The herbal preparations of Adhatoda zeylanica include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
